info.title: Strukt AI Floorplan 3D API
info.description: REST API for converting 2D floorplan images into 3D models. Handles job queuing, SVG management, furniture placement, and interactive segmentation.

get.description: Lightweight health endpoint to verify the service is running.
Returns system health including connected workers.
Generates and returns an Excel file with system metrics.

post.description: Verify Google ID Token and return user info.
Login and receive authentication token.

get.description: Get all runs/jobs filtered by the current user.

post.description: Create a new run, save image, and enqueue job for Worker.

get.description: Get detailed metadata for a specific run.
Check the processing status of a specific run.
Return the current SVG for a run as image/svg+xml.

put.description: Update the SVG for a run. Updates current.svg and syncs to Azure.

get.description: Return the raw inference SVG (clean.svg) for debugging.
Return the locked SVG snapshot used for 3D generation.

post.description: Freeze the current SVG into svg_for_3d.svg for deterministic 3D generation.
Trigger 3D generation for a run. Moves status from WAITING to PENDING.
Trigger Room Detection (OCR + Geometry) on current SVG.
Trigger Blender rendering and return render image URLs.

get.description: Download the Blender .blend file for a run.
Download the GLB 3D model for a run.

post.description: Append a furniture selection to a per-run category batch.

get.description: Get the current furniture batch for a run.

post.description: Promote all per-category furniture batch jobs to WAITING_AWS for processing.

get.description: Return the per-run FurnAI assets manifest.

post.description: Upload a custom GLB model for a run.

get.description: Serve a file from inside the run directory (for loading GLBs).

post.description: Apply an uploaded texture image to a specific SVG element.

target_id.description: SVG element ID to apply texture to

put.description: Save placements.json. Does NOT trigger 3D rebuild.

post.description: Capture email for offline queueing.
Copy run's current SVG into sidecar uploads for MethodDraw editor.
Delete stale click_* jobs for the current user.
Delete stale non-click jobs for the current user.
Analyzes the wall layout and detects closed rooms.
Handle user click for SAM3D segmentation. Creates high-priority click job.
Trigger 3D reconstruction for a segmented object.
Submit a batch of furniture masks to AWS dispatcher queue.
Use LLaVA (via VisionLLMAnalyzer) to modify the 3D model.

get.description: Worker nodes poll for the next pending job.
Worker downloads the source image for a job.

post.description: Worker uploads results (SVG, Blend, GLB, Metadata).
